creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Leon Dietrich from comment #4)

> This is the php71 config file

Looks fine, indeed. Can you please add the build log of lang/php71?

> In the mean time is it possible to mark this port as broken so one can 
> manually fix the mediawiki installations and let poudriere handle it 
> again once the issue has been fixed?

Not really, because it seems to be only broken for you. I can compile it with default options and non-default options. And beside my own installation the FreeBSD binary package repo is build fine and does not create any fallout.

Marking it broken will break it for everyone else too.

But i'm positive that the build log of lang/php71 should reveal the problem. :)

If you use your own poudriere you can still mark the port in your own repo as broken and move on.
